name: Investigate Suspicious Concurrent Sessions
description: A proctor reported that student 'alex_rogue' seemed to be active in the 'Midterm Exam' but was also seen logging in from a different device. The Academic Integrity Board needs the IP addresses of all sessions initiated by this user to determine if they were sharing their credentials. Identify all unique Client IP addresses associated with user 'alex_rogue' from the system logs and save them to '~/Documents/rogue_ips.txt' with one IP per line.
